message.content:
@startuml
participant Client
participant Device

note left of Client : Send UDP broadcast to port 56700\ntagged = 1
Client -> Device : Lx::Protocol::Device::GetService

note left of Client : Register device service and port\nFuture messages can be unicast datagrams
Device -> Client : Lx::Protocol::Device::StateService

note left of Client : source = <unique 32bit id>\nack_required = true\nsequence = <wrap around sequence>
Client -> Device : Lx::Protocol::Device::SetLabel

note right of Device : source = <unique 32bit id from request>\nsequence = <sequence number from request>
Device -> Client : Lx::Protocol::Device::Acknowlegement

@enduml
